governing_law.value: Laws of the State of New York
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with, the laws of the State of New York, without giving effect to the conflict of laws principles thereof.

fields.payment_terms: monthly within twenty-five (25) business days following receipt of reports
fields.notice_period: thirty (30) days after written notice for termination for cause; ten (10) days after notice for termination for bankruptcy
